campaign.name: MD OHCQ Staffing — DON LinkedIn + Email

messages:
Hi Director,

I'm reaching out because WILLOWBROOKE CT SKILLED CARE BUCKINGHAM'S CHOICE in Frederick County has been flagged for recent OHCQ/CMS staffing citation — and DON teams are feeling it on the floor.

VettedMe.ai instantly routes MBON-verified, active Maryland GNAs and LPNs to open shifts within 15 minutes — credentialed staff only, no compliance surprises.

Would you be open to connecting? Happy to show how we clear staffing gaps fast.

— VettedMe Team, VettedMe.ai
payload.fallbackMessage: Hi there — VettedMe.ai routes credentialed Maryland GNAs and LPNs to open shifts within 15 minutes. Would love to connect.

messages:
Thanks for connecting, Director.

Quick context: we work with SNF/ALF operators in Frederick County who need credentialed coverage yesterday — not next week.

VettedMe.ai's compliance gate (MBON + HB 1106 + fresh license checks) means every GNA/LPN we dispatch is active and floor-ready. Most facilities see matched clinicians in under 15 minutes once a shift is posted.

If WILLOWBROOKE CT SKILLED CARE BUCKINGHAM'S CHOICE is still carrying a staffing citation or hour shortfall, I can walk your team through a same-week coverage plan.

Worth a 15-minute call this week?

payload.subject: WILLOWBROOKE CT SKILLED CARE BUCKINGHAM'S CHOICE in Frederick County — credentialed GNA/LPN coverage in 15 minutes
payload.body:
Hi Director,

Following up on my LinkedIn note — I'm VettedMe Team with VettedMe.ai.

WILLOWBROOKE CT SKILLED CARE BUCKINGHAM'S CHOICE in Frederick County was flagged for recent OHCQ/CMS staffing citation. When survey pressure hits, the last thing your DON desk needs is unverified agency send-backs.

VettedMe.ai is built for Maryland operators under OHCQ scrutiny:

• MBON-verified GNAs & LPNs — active license, GNA endorsement where required
• Compliance sentinel blocks staff with stale credentials or missing HB 1106 consent
• Instant shift routing — matched, credentialed clinicians in ~15 minutes
• County-aware dispatch — we prioritize Frederick coverage first

If you're clearing a staffing citation or mandated hour gap, reply with your next open shift window and I'll share a live match preview for WILLOWBROOKE CT SKILLED CARE BUCKINGHAM'S CHOICE.

— VettedMe Team
VettedMe.ai
Maryland SNF/ALF instant staffing · MBON-gated dispatch
payload.fallbackBody: Hi there — VettedMe.ai routes MBON-verified Maryland GNAs and LPNs to open shifts within 15 minutes. Reply if you'd like a coverage walkthrough.
